author: Glenn
text:
Jude needs to do the same with his own token — each person sets their own on
   their own machine. Once it's set the red warning disappears and sessions   
  will save to GitHub.                                                        
                           1. GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Tokens 
  (classic)                                                                   
  2. Click Generate new token (classic)
  3. Give it a name (e.g. "CGT Admin")                                        
  4. Check repo scope (full repo access)                    
  5. Generate → copy the token          
  6. Paste it into the Token field in CGT Admin → Save Token
